proposition: All Demerzel personas have corresponding behavioral tests as required by persona-requirements rule

supporting.claim: All 14 personas now have dedicated behavioral test files in tests/behavioral/: default, demerzel, seldon, skeptical-auditor, kaizen-optimizer, reflective-architect, system-integrator, communal-steward, convolution-agent, critical-theorist, rational-administrator, recovery-agent, validator-reflector, virtuous-leader
